name: the md namespace validates structurally and is registered as a known namespace grounded in commonmark
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-source-file.sh" --file "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/md/md-standards.yaml" 2>v.txt; grep -q 'valid=true' v.txt && grep -q 'source: commonmark' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/md/md-standards.yaml" && grep -q ' md ' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-all.sh" && echo md-registered-grounded 1>&2
